title: Generate Report
content: A citable ESG & SDG data profile for one territory — every indicator we've gathered, explained in plain language and downloadable as a PDF. Built for compliance buyers, suppliers and investors, not just internal dashboards. 1. Select Territory 2. Include Sections Executive Summary SDG Coverage Coverage & Limitations Methodology & Sources Generate & Download PDF
